steps.title: Extract and interpret the y-intercept
steps.content:
The function is $f(x) = -4x + 36$. The y-intercept is the value when $x = 0$:
$$f(0) = -4(0) + 36 = 36$$
In this context, $x = 0$ means no mugs have been decorated yet, so 36 fluid ounces is the amount of paint Jordan had before he started decorating mugs.

steps.title: Match to the correct interpretation
steps.content: The y-intercept of 36 represents the initial paint amount, not a per-item rate. The matching choice states that Jordan had approximately 36 fluid ounces of paint when he began to decorate the mugs, which matches our interpretation of the y-intercept. This matches - C is correct.
